name: U-47700
summary: A µ-opioid receptor agonist that is related to AH-7921. Having a very short duration.

legacy.addictionPotential: moderately addictive with a high potential for abuse

tolerance.full: develops with prolonged and repeated use

toxicities: high toxicity relative to its dose due to its extreme potency
potentially lethal when mixed with depressants like alcohol or benzodiazepines
